title: Home Page Rendering and Content Verification
description: Verify that the Home Page loads correctly with hero section, about me, education, skills dock, portfolio showcase, and contact information displayed as per design.

steps.description: Navigate to the Home Page URL.
Verify hero section is visible with correct text and styles.
Check 'About Me' section renders with correct content.
Confirm 'Education' section displays correct entries.
Verify Skills Dock shows correct icons and animations.
Ensure Portfolio section displays project cards.
Check Contact Section shows phone, email, and social media buttons.
Validate that all sections conform to responsive design on desktop, tablet, and mobile screens.

title: Navigation Bar Responsiveness and Functionality
description: Verify the Navigation Bar adapts correctly across devices, menu items function, search works, and theme toggle can switch themes.

steps.description: Load the site on desktop viewport.
Check navigation menu items are visible and correctly labeled.
Resize viewport to mobile size.
Ensure navigation transforms to mobile menu (e.g., hamburger menu).
Open mobile menu and verify menu items accessibility.
Use search input to enter a valid query.
Confirm search filters projects or site content accurately.
Toggle theme switch once.
Verify theme changes from light to dark with smooth animation.
Page reload to verify theme preference is persisted.
Ensure switched theme is applied after reload.

title: Portfolio Section Filtering and Search
description: Check correct functionality of filtering by project type and searching projects with valid and invalid inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to Portfolio section.
Filter projects by type 'Web'.
Only web projects are displayed with correct animations.
Filter projects by type 'Mobile'.
Only mobile projects are shown.
Enter a valid search keyword in portfolio search.
Projects matching search keyword are displayed.
Enter an invalid or random search keyword.
No projects displayed and user-friendly empty state is shown.
Clear filters and search input.
All projects are displayed again without animation glitches.

title: Theme Toggling with Animation and Persistence
description: Verify theme toggle component changes themes with smooth animation and saves preference across sessions.

steps.description: On Home Page, locate theme toggle switch.
Toggle theme from light to dark.
Theme switches with visible smooth animation and colors update accordingly.
Toggle theme back to light.
Animation plays and light theme is restored.
Reload the page.
Previously selected theme is persisted and applied automatically.

title: Document Download Modal Functionality
description: Verify that the modal for downloading CV and Portfolio documents opens correctly, and file downloads initiate properly.

steps.description: Trigger the Document Download Modal via designated button or link.
Modal appears with options for CV and Portfolio PDF documents.
Click to download CV document.
PDF download initiates and file integrity is verified.
Click to download Portfolio document.
Portfolio PDF downloads successfully.
Close the modal.
Modal closes without UI glitches.

title: Social Media Links Verification
description: Ensure social media buttons and links navigate to correct external profiles and open in new tabs.

steps.description: Locate LinkedIn, GitHub, and Instagram links in navigation and contact sections.
Click each social media link.
Each link opens the corresponding profile in a new browser tab.
Link URLs exactly match specified project profiles.

title: Animated UI Components Rendering and Behavior
description: Validate that animated UI components such as gradient text, shimmer buttons, magic cards, text animations, and border beams render correctly and run smoothly without UI jank.

steps.description: Visit pages or sections containing animated UI components.
Verify gradient text animation appears and transitions as expected.
Ensure shimmer buttons blink/shimmer correctly on hover or load.
Check magic cards respond interactively and animate according to user actions.
Confirm border beam and text-animate components run their animations smoothly without frame drop.
No animation causes UI elements to freeze or lag.

title: Skills Dock Display and Responsiveness
description: Verify that the animated Skills Dock correctly displays all programming language and tool icons with correct animations and responsive layout.

steps.description: Navigate to Skills Dock section on Home Page.
All expected skill icons are displayed with proper labels or tooltips.
Animations like icon scaling or hover effects function correctly.
Skills Dock layout adjusts gracefully on different screen sizes.

title: Contact Section Accessibility and Functionality
description: Test that the Contact Section displays contact info clearly and all communication buttons (phone, email, social media) work as intended.

steps.description: Navigate to Contact Section.
Phone number and email are clearly displayed and selectable.
Click phone contact button on mobile device.
Device initiates call action with correct number.
Click email button.
Default email client opens with recipient address pre-filled.
Click social media contact buttons.
Each opens respective profile in new tab/window.

title: Accessibility Compliance Testing
description: Verify that the website meets accessibility standards including keyboard navigation, screen reader usability, and appropriate ARIA attributes on interactive elements.

steps.description: Navigate through the site using keyboard only (tab, shift+tab, enter).
All interactive elements receive focus in a logical order.
Theme toggle, modal dialogs, navigation menus and buttons are operable via keyboard.
Use a screen reader to navigate key sections.
Screen reader reads descriptive labels, including ARIA attributes on buttons, links, and form elements.
No keyboard traps or inaccessible controls encountered.

title: Performance and Load Speed Testing
description: Ensure that the portfolio website loads quickly and performs smoothly on various devices meeting performance benchmarks.

steps.description: Load the site on desktop, mobile, and tablet devices.
Page load times are within industry standard targets (e.g., under 3 seconds on 3G simulations).
Animations and UI interactions run without lag or dropped frames.
Use Vercel Speed Insights or similar tools to measure and report performance metrics.
All performance scores meet or exceed baseline requirements.

title: Error Handling for Missing or Invalid Data
description: Test the application behavior when data such as projects, skills, or configuration entries are missing or malformed.

steps.description: Simulate missing project data or empty project list.
Portfolio section shows a user-friendly message indicating no projects available.
Simulate malformed or missing skill icons data.
Skills Dock gracefully degrades with placeholders or empty state message without crashing.
Modify site configuration with missing navigation items.
Navigation bar handles missing items without rendering errors.
